description: Data-grounded sprint retrospectives from your Jira, GitHub, and Slack activity.
name: io.github.sathvic-kollu/retro-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Your Jira Cloud site, e.g. https://your-company.atlassian.net. Required for a live retro.
environmentVariables.name: JIRA_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Atlassian account email the API token belongs to.
environmentVariables.name: JIRA_EMAIL

environmentVariables.description: Jira API token from id.atlassian.com. Read-only use.
environmentVariables.name: JIRA_API_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Optional board id to pin when the account has several boards.
environmentVariables.name: JIRA_BOARD_ID

environmentVariables.description: Optional GitHub read-only token for PR review latency and reverts.
environmentVariables.name: GITHUB_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Optional comma-separated owner/name repos to scope PR analysis.
environmentVariables.name: GITHUB_REPOS

environmentVariables.description: Optional Slack read token to scan sprint channels for blocker and incident language.
environmentVariables.name: SLACK_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Optional comma-separated Slack channel ids to scan for the sprint window.
environmentVariables.name: SLACK_CHANNELS

environmentVariables.description: Set to true to force the synthetic demo sprint even when credentials are present.
environmentVariables.name: RETRO_DEMO_MODE

title: Data-grounded sprint retro
